erp.headline: Turn Back-Office Chaos into Clear, Visible Profit
erp.body: We understand that the heart of a modern business isn't just working hard — it's having accurate data to make the right decisions instantly.
erp.f3_desc: Track net profit at a glance

flynn.title: THE MANAGEMENT CREATOR TOOLS
flynn.workflow_b1: The most impressive feature — just copy a long brief from LINE, DM, or email and paste it into the app. The AI automatically extracts brand name, fee, draft deadline, and post date, then schedules the job for you.
flynn.workflow_b2: See all your jobs at a glance — from 'In Negotiation', 'In Production', 'Pending Review', all the way to 'Completed' — in a single view.
flynn.finance_b1: Track every income amount with clear separation between 'Transferred' and 'Pending Payment', plus monthly income summaries.
flynn.finance_b2: Generate professional invoices or payment request links (N-Link) and send them to clients instantly via chat.
flynn.reminder_b: An intelligent alert system that doesn't just notify you when it's due — it nudges you in advance based on job 'complexity', giving you time to finish drafts and maintain 100% trust with your agency network.
flynn.insights_b: Review historical stats to see which brands hire you most often and which job types yield the best profit — so you can choose future work with precision.
